name: cedarstalk
title: CedarStalk
description: Search the Cedarville University student/staff directory
author: taciturnaxolotl

commands.name: search-directory
commands.title: Search Cedarville Directory
commands.description: Search the Cedarville directory by name

preferences.name: demoMode
preferences.title: Demo Mode
preferences.description: Redact personal information for screenshots and demos
preferences.label: Hide personal data

scripts.prebuild: swiftc -O assets/auth-browser.swift -target arm64-apple-macos13 -o /tmp/cedarstalk-auth-arm64 && swiftc -O assets/auth-browser.swift -target x86_64-apple-macos13 -o /tmp/cedarstalk-auth-x86_64 && lipo -create -output assets/auth-browser-bin /tmp/cedarstalk-auth-arm64 /tmp/cedarstalk-auth-x86_64 && codesign --sign - --force assets/auth-browser-bin
